title: Synthesis of Sodium Chloride (NaCl)
safety: Handle acids and bases with care.

steps.instruction: First, let's identify our acid. Please hold the test tube labeled 1 containing Hydrochloric Acid inside the camera box.
hints: Look for the test tube with the number 1 label.
common_errors: Grabbing the base instead of the acid.

steps.instruction: Great! Now, let's identify our base. Please hold the test tube labeled 2 containing Sodium Hydroxide inside the camera box.
hints: Look for the test tube with the number 2 label.

steps.instruction: Excellent. Now carefully pour the contents of test tube 1 and test tube 2 into your mixing vessel. When done, hold the mixing vessel labeled 3 inside the camera box to complete the experiment.
hints: Pour slowly to avoid splashing. Neutralization produces salt water.
